title: B1 Listening - Part 1 - Test 1
instructions: For each question, listen to the recording and choose the correct answer: A, B or C.

items.context: You hear two students talking about a school trip.
items.audio_script: Girl: Are we still meeting outside the library for the school trip? I thought I remembered correctly, but I have not checked my messages today. || Boy: That was the original plan, but the coach will collect us from the other side of school. [1]We need to meet by the sports hall instead[/1]. || Girl: That was lucky; I almost went there. I would have gone to the wrong place and wondered where everyone was. || Boy: Do not worry. I will arrive ten minutes early, so look for me near the entrance. Keep your phone on in case anything changes again.
items.question: Where should they meet?
items.explanation: They need to meet by the sports hall.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about a camping weekend.
items.audio_script: Boy: Have you packed for the camping weekend yet? I put a torch in my bag because I thought that was what we needed. || Girl: That was on the first list, but the forecast says the nights will be much colder. [2]Everyone needs to bring a warm sleeping bag now[/2]. || Boy: I am glad I checked. I was about to leave my bag by the door and forget about it. || Girl: There is still time. Put it in now, and check the final message once more before we leave tomorrow morning.
items.question: What should they bring?
items.explanation: They are told to bring a warm sleeping bag.

items.context: You hear two friends making plans for Saturday.
items.audio_script: Girl: Are we still going shopping on Saturday afternoon? I told my sister I would be home later, so I need to know. || Boy: That was the idea, but the shops will be extremely busy because of the sale. [3]We are going to go bowling with my cousins instead[/3]. || Girl: That is fine with me. I nearly paid for the other activity online this morning. || Boy: It is lucky that you checked first. I will book our places this evening and send you the time. We can meet at the bus stop after lunch.
items.question: What are they going to do?
items.explanation: They decide to go bowling instead.

items.context: You hear two people talking about a dentist appointment.
items.audio_script: Woman: I need to write down the time for the dentist appointment. Is it still at ten o'clock, like you said yesterday? || Man: No, the dentist has an emergency patient first. [4]It starts at half past ten now[/4], although we should arrive ten minutes earlier. || Woman: Thanks; I nearly wrote down the wrong time. I would have been waiting there at the wrong time. || Man: I will send you a reminder later. Bring everything you need, because there will not be time to go home again before it begins.
items.question: What time is the appointment?
items.explanation: The appointment now starts at half past ten.

items.context: You hear two teenagers talking about a new phone.
items.audio_script: Boy: How are you getting on with your new phone? I heard it was not working properly. || Girl: I first thought the screen was too small, and my brother wondered if the camera was broken. But he checked it carefully last night. [5]The battery runs out before lunchtime every day[/5]. || Boy: Can it be fixed before your trip on Saturday? || Girl: I think so. We know what is wrong now, and the repair shop said it should be ready tomorrow afternoon. That is a relief because I need it this weekend.
items.question: What is the problem with the phone?
items.explanation: The problem is that the battery runs out before lunchtime.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about getting to town.
items.audio_script: Woman: Are you still travelling to town by bus? I could meet you when you arrive. || Man: I planned to, but there are roadworks on the bus route. I considered going by taxi, but a taxi will cost too much today. [6]I am going by train instead[/6]. || Woman: That sounds like the best plan. What time will you get there? || Man: Just before eleven, if everything is on time. I have already checked the timetable online, so it should be easy. I will message you when I leave, so you do not have to wait outside.
items.question: How will the speaker get to town?

items.context: You hear two people talking about a present for Mum.
items.audio_script: Man: Did you buy some flowers for Mum's birthday? I saw one in the shop window yesterday and thought it looked nice. || Woman: No. I looked at some flowers, and I nearly chose a box of chocolates, but she is trying not to eat sweet things and she lost her old scarf. [7]I bought a warm scarf in the end[/7]. || Man: I think that was the right choice. It sounds more useful, and I think it will be appreciated. || Woman: I hope so. I kept the receipt, just in case it needs changing after we give it.
items.question: What present did the speaker buy?
